description: Autonomous Upwork proposal factory: RSS job scraping, ICP scoring, Claude AI proposal generation, Telegram approval gate, Supabase tracking on port 3107

features.name: packages/upwork-hunter/ package setup: package.json (port 3107), tsconfig.json, full directory structure with src/api, src/lib, src/types, tests/
GET /health returns { status: 'ok', service: 'upwork-hunter', port: 3107 } with server running on :3107
src/api/job-scraper.ts fetches Upwork RSS for 5 query strings, parses XML, deduplicates by job URL, returns UpworkJob[] with title, url, description, budget, pubDate
Job scoring function: scores 0-100 based on keyword matches (ai, automation, saas, claude, workflow), budget signals, recency, hourly vs fixed — excludes wordpress/shopify/data-entry

Supabase upwork_proposals table migration: id, job_id (unique), job_title, job_url, job_description, budget, score, proposal_text, status, offer_type, telegram_message_id, submitted_at, created_at — applied idempotently on server start
src/api/proposal-gen.ts: generateProposal(job, offer) calls claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 with Isaiah's persona prompt, returns proposal_text under 300 words
src/api/telegram-gate.ts: sends proposal preview to TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, long-polls for /approve_{id} or /reject_{id} replies, updates Supabase status — gracefully skips if TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not set
GET /api/jobs/search triggers RSS fetch + scoring, returns top 10 scored jobs from Supabase
GET /api/jobs/pending returns all jobs with status=pending from Supabase upwork_proposals
POST /api/proposals/generate generates Claude proposal for a job by jobId, stores in Supabase, returns { jobId, proposal_text, status }
POST /api/proposals/approve/:jobId and POST /api/proposals/reject/:jobId update status in Supabase — manual approval for testing without Telegram
GET /api/proposals/stats returns { pending, approved, rejected, submitted, won } counts from Supabase
POST /api/scan full pipeline: fetch RSS -> score -> generate proposals -> send to Telegram — returns scan summary { jobs_found, above_threshold, proposals_generated }
Autonomous scan loop: setInterval every 4 hours calls runFullScan(), logs [scan] prefix, deduplicates against existing Supabase rows by job_id
tests/upwork-hunter.test.ts Layer 1: GET /health and GET /api/proposals/stats pass without external deps
tests/upwork-hunter.test.ts Layer 2: GET /api/jobs/search returns >=1 job with score > 0 (real RSS fetch)
npm run build passes with zero TypeScript errors
